rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY D. MURPHY VS. MICHAEL YAKOVLEVICH KLESTOFF et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT LAUREL SCRIVANI as representative and adminstratrix of estate of Kathleen E. Dubs's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Scrivani's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is continued to July 26, 2013 to be heard in Department 613 by Honorable Ernest Goldsmith in Department 613 at 10:00 a.m. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY D. MURPHY VS. MICHAEL YAKOVLEVICH KLESTOFF et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT LAUREL SCRIVANI as representative and adminstratrix of estate of Kathleen E. Dubs's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Scrivani's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to July 26, 2013 to be heard in Department 613 by Honorable Ernest Goldsmith in Department 613 at 10:00 a.m. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative First Amended Complaint to Department 501 no later than July 22, 2013 4 p.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO AMADO VAZ VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC., RANDY SHAW, PRATIBAH TEKKEY and CLIFFORD GILMORE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address, in good faith, all issues raised by demurrer. Late-filed opposition by attorney, not of record, is stricken. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO AMADO VAZ VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC., RANDY SHAW, PRATIBAH TEKKEY and CLIFFORD GILMORE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is GRANTED as to counts 4 and 5 and prayer for attorney's fees without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: NASSEEM KHAN VS. NIK REYNGACH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT NODARIY REYNGACH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint SUSTAINED WITH 5 Day LEAVE TO AMEND to attach a legible copy of "3 Day Notice" and to reconcile allegations in paragraph 6 and paragraph 9. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: PERRY CLOSE VS. JOSE PEREZ SR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 4 - PLAINTIFF PERRY CLOSE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issues of facts exists as to material facts numbers 5 and 10. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: CHEH LEE VS. LYNN MEREDITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 22, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF CHEH LEE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses GRANTED as to all requests, except Specially Prepared Interrogatory #28, subject to opposition. Hearing Required as to Specially Prepared Interrogatory #28. Defendant shall provide further verified responses no later than noon on July 25, 2013 by personal service. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885 to be paid by noon on July 26, 2013. =(501/HD)
